sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - HEMMA (-[20 Feb] after 1152).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hemma von Zollern於大約1097年出生在德國海因里希_霍恩左勒奧拉赤 賀辛根維辛根時，她的父親Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern38歲，母親Udalhild von Urach26歲。她與Palatine Count Hugo von Tübingen III結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1152年在她的家鄉享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Zollern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Halloran
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAllmhuráin ‘descendant of Allmhurán’, a personal name from a diminutive of allmhurach ‘foreigner’ (from all ‘beyond’ + muir ‘sea’).

nameMeanings.name: Hemma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a medieval Italian nickname meaning ‘gem, jewel’. It has been chosen in modern times mainly because of its transparent etymology. Among Roman Catholics it is sometimes chosen in honour of  St Gemma Galgani  (  1878–1903 ), who was the subject of many extraordinary signs of grace, such as ecstasies and the appearance of the stigmata. It was extremely popular in the 1980s but has since faded slightly.

en.lifeSummary: When Hemma von Zollern was born about 1097, in Wessingen, Oberamt Hechingen, Hohenzollern, Prussia, Germany, her father, Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern, was 38 and her mother, Udalhild von Urach, was 26. She married Palatine Count Hugo von Tübingen III. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1152, in her hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hemma von Zollern est née environ 1097, à Wessingen, Oberamt Hechingen, Hohenzollern, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Udalhild von Urach, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Palatine Count Hugo von Tübingen III. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1152, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hemma von Zollern um 1097 in Wessingen, Oberamt Hechingen, Hohenzollern, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern 38 und ihre Mutter Udalhild von Urach 26. Sie hat Palatine Count Hugo von Tübingen III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1152 im Alter von 56 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hemma von Zollern è nata il circa 1097 nel Wessingen, Oberamt Hechingen, Hohenzollern, Preußen, Germania, sua padre, Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Udalhild von Urach, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Palatine Count Hugo von Tübingen III. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1152, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ko.Wessingen, Hechingen, Hohenzollern, Preu: 독일 프레우ss 호헨졸레른 오베램트 헤친겐 웨징
ko.lifeSummary: Hemma von Zollern(이)가 대략 1097년 독일 프레우ss 호헨졸레른 오베램트 헤친겐 웨징에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Udalhild von Urach(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Palatine Count Hugo von Tübingen III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1152년 그녀의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hemma von Zollern nasceu aproximadamente 1097, em Wessingen, Oberamt Hechingen, Hohenzollern, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Udalhild von Urach, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Palatine Count Hugo von Tübingen III. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1152, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.Wessingen, Hechingen, Hohenzollern, Preu: вессинген, обирамт хечинген, хохензоллирн, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hemma von Zollern родилась около 1097 г. в местности вессинген, обирамт хечинген, хохензоллирн, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Udalhild von Urach, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Palatine Count Hugo von Tübingen III. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1152 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

Graf von Zollern, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Udalhild von Urach, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Palatine Count Hugo von Tübingen III. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1152, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
